Appearances:
Plaintiff Case De La Raza, is present. Represented by Francisco Borvis.
Attorney, Brenda Keith Cruz, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Ida Amaya and Angel Amaya, are present.
Attorney, Peter Chess , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of JAN-18-2011 remains on calendar.
